sources.title: Dead Men Can't Dance | Classic Action War Movie | Michael Biehn | Adrian Paul
sources.description:
Dead Men Can't Dance | Classic Action War Movie | Michael Biehn | Adrian Paul - Elite army unit is assigned to destroy North Korea's lone nuclear facility.

Rewind with us every Thursday as we roll out a Hollywood classic starring your favorite legends from the '80s and '90s. It’s Movie Central’s Throwback Thursdays!

1997.  Stars: Michael Biehn, Mark Edward Anderson, Adrian Paul
Licensed from Lionsgate. All rights reserved

metadata.Plot: To stamp out the threat of nuclear war a special ops team must travel to North Korea to carry out a covert mission to destroy a nuclear power plant. Everything does not go as planned. Their communications are cut off and they must remember their survival training to get them through.
metadata.Director: Stephen Milburn Anderson, Hubert de La Bouillerie
metadata.Writer: Paul Sinor, Mark Sevi, Bill Kerby
metadata.Actors: Michael Biehn, Mark Edward Anderson, Adrian Paul
